input_files._role_summary: 5 IMMUTABLE input files required to reproduce 97/97 EXACT result. All SHA-256 fingerprints are bit-exact pinned. Independent reproduction at the type-alpha grade requires these exact fingerprints to match.

transform_script_rev_6_final.role: Layer C v1.1 -> v1.2 schema transform tool (rev 6 final form). Anchor 22 v0.2 publicly pinned SHA. Reads canonical re-run JSON, applies per-field / per-mbin_gc / field_consistency / gc_M_star_slope dispatch with v1.1 key cross-fill, drops 3 keys with explicit byte-weight account, writes Layer C v1.2 candidate. Run in --commit mode.
transform_script_rev_6_final.argparse_description: Layer C v1.1 -> v1.2 schema transform tool (rev 6)

envelope_expectations._role: What independent reproduction at type-alpha grade should observe.
envelope_expectations.mirror_run_invocation: WSL2 axis1_q2 conda env (Python 3.13.13 / numpy 2.4.3 / scipy 1.17.1), via PowerShell -> bash wrapper -> wsl -d Ubuntu bash <wrapper.sh>
envelope_expectations.expected_per_leaf_delta: 0.0 (bit-exact strict equality, tolerance margin not needed)

necessary_conditions.condition: mirror v0.3 vs Layer C v1.2 candidate: 97/97 EXACT

_drafting_metadata._note_to_verifier: Truncated SHA values above (e.g., '5d9beb04361e0b21f1b7') are placeholders for the full 64-character SHA-256 fingerprints. Claude Code-side SHA verify round must (a) read the actual files, (b) compute SHA-256, (c) replace each truncated value with the full hex string, (d) cross-check against handoff memo §3.3 + §3.5 reference values.
